case_title: JACQUELINE VALVERDE VS. MI TIERRA TAX, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALVERDE, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT MI TIERRA TAX, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP WHITE, MICHELLE INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF MI TIERRA TAX, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALVERDE, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MI TIERRA TAX, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP WHITE, MICHELLE INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF MI TIERRA TAX, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $4,700.89 PRINCIPAL, $61.97 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,987.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
